data.content: Plan v3 addresses the two prior rejection reasons: (1) the fix changes SelectContent default from item-aligned to popper in select.tsx:56, and (2) browser-level verification uses a Storybook play() function with @storybook/test that records scroll position and bounding rects before/after opening each of the 7 selects in the FilterBar multi-select view. RepoSwitcher (DropdownMenu) is verification-only scope. All quality gates listed. Ready for plan_review.
